message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
namespace domain {
    interface INodeVisitor {
        +visit(node: Probe)
        +visit(node: Input)
        +visit(node: AndGate)
        +visit(node: NAndGate)
        +visit(node: NORGate)
        +visit(node: ORGate)
        +visit(node: XORGate)
    }

    class Circuit {
        +Circuit()
        +addNode(node: Node)
        +addInput(node: Input)
        +addProbe(node: Probe)
        +getNodes(): Set<Node>
        +getInputs(): Set<Input>
        +getInput(name: String)
        +getProbes(): Set<Probe>
        +getProbe(name: String)
        +simulate()
        +addSimulationListener(simulationListener: ISimulationListener)
        +addSimulationListeners(simulationListeners: Collection<ISimulationListener>)
    }

    class Node {
        +value: boolean
        +name: String
        +Node(name: String)
        +getName(): String
        +getValue(): boolean
        +addToCircuit(circuit: Circuit)
        +addSimulationListener(simulationListener: ISimulationListener)
        +notifyStartCalculation()
        +notifyStopCalculation(calculatedValue: boolean)
        +calculate(): boolean
        +accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    }

    class NodeComposite {
        +parents: List<Node>
        +NodeComposite(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        +addParent(Node)
        +removeParent(Node)
        +getParents(): List<Node>
        +calculated: boolean
    }

    class AndGate {
        +AndGate(name: String)
        +AndGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        +calculated: boolean
        +accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    }

    class NAndGate {
        +NAndGate(name: String)
        +NAndGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        +calculated: boolean
        +accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    }

    class NORGate {
        +NORGate(name: String)
        +NORGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        +calculated: boolean
        +accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    }

    class NotGate {
        +NotGate(name: String)
        +NotGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        +calculated: boolean
        +accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    }

    class OrGate {
        +OrGate(name: String)
        +OrGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        +calculated: boolean
        +accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    }

    class XORGate {
        +XORGate(name: String)
        +XORGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        +calculated: boolean
        +accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    }

    class Probe {
        +Probe(name: String)
        +Probe(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        +calculate(): boolean
        +accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
        +addToCircuit(circuit: Circuit)
    }

    class Input {
        +Input(value: boolean, name: String)
        +setValue(value: boolean)
        +calculate(): boolean
        +accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
        +addToCircuit(circuit: Circuit)
    }

    class ISimulationListener {
    }

    Circuit "0..*" --> "nodes" Node : 
    Circuit "0..*" --> "inputs" Input : 
    Circuit "0..*" --> "probes" Probe : 
    Circuit "0..*" --> "simulationListeners" ISimulationListener : 
    Node "0..*" --> "parents" NodeComposite : 
    Node "0..*" --> "simulationListeners" ISimulationListener : 
    NodeComposite <|-- AndGate : 
    NodeComposite <|-- NAndGate : 
    NodeComposite <|-- NORGate : 
    NodeComposite <|-- NotGate : 
    NodeComposite <|-- OrGate : 
    NodeComposite <|-- XORGate : 
    NodeComposite <|-- Probe : 
    NodeComposite <|-- Input : 
}
@enduml
```
